summary: M0-T016 ACCEPTED (27th): control-plane hardening follow-up closes M0-T014 G5 D1/D2 + G3 OBS-3 (orchestrator rejected in reviewer rosters and at independent gates; --gates G0-G7 enum validation; blocked tasks with empty/invalid rosters cannot unblock until packet amendment).
